case_title: ERIC RAY FORKS ET AL VS. ALPHA TOWING & RECOVERY LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ALPHA TOWING & RECOVERY LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-13-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS ERIC RAY FORKS AND LUCILLE BONNER IS PRESENT. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2024 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUN-14-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS ERIC RAY FORKS AND LUCILE BONNOR ARE PRESENT. MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY FORKS, ERIC RAY BONNER, LUCILLE M AS TO DEFENDANT ALPHA TOWING & RECOVERY LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2024 - JUDGMENT.
